raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Nonprofit Security Grant Program was established to provide security funding for nonprofit organizations at risk of hate-motivated violence.",
    "The state of California is responding to an increase in hate crimes and antisemitism by funding security resources for vulnerable communities.",
    "The California Office of Emergency Services awarded $15 million in grants to 87 nonprofit organizations through the California State Nonprofit Security Grant Program.",
    "The legislation establishing the California State Nonprofit Security Grant Program was signed by Governor Gavin Newsom.",
    "AB 1548 marked a historic commitment by the State of California to increase protection for vulnerable institutions against hate-motivated violence.",
    "The California State Nonprofit Security Grant Program received 456 applications for funding.",
    "The maximum grant awarded through the California State Nonprofit Security Grant Program is $200,000 per institution.",
    "Many nonprofit institutions operate on extremely limited budgets and are unable to fund needed security enhancements without grants."
  ]
}
```
